hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of National Frog Jumping Day, we celebrate the lighthearted and fun Hairspray, a movie that will have you jumping with joy.
hero.blurb: This musical comedy is a fun and upbeat film that is perfect for the whole family. With its catchy songs and impressive dance numbers, Hairspray is a movie that will have you dancing in your seat.

released.title: The Da Vinci Code
released.reason: Released today in 2006, this film is still widely popular for its intriguing mystery and historical twists, making it a great choice for fans of the book and new viewers alike.
released.blurb: This movie is a thrilling adventure that takes you on a wild ride through Europe's most famous cities. With its intricate plot and surprising turns, The Da Vinci Code is a must-see for anyone who loves a good mystery.

birthday.title: Scream 3
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Deborah Ann Woll, born May 13, 1985, we celebrate her role in this horror classic, which still sends chills down our spines today.
birthday.blurb: This horror movie is a thrilling ride that will keep you on the edge of your seat. With its unexpected twists and turns, Scream 3 is a must-see for fans of the genre.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: This movie is so bad, it's good, with an impressively low IMDb rating of 3.4, making it a hilarious addition to our Dumpster Dive category.
awful.blurb: This action movie is a laughable mess, with terrible acting and a ridiculous plot. With its over-the-top action sequences and cringe-worthy dialogue, Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever is a movie that will leave you questioning its very existence.
